name: Hide of Terramorphous
description: Hide of Terramorphous is a legendary shield made by Bandit in Borderlands 2.
notes:
The fire spikes and fire nova are extra effects, not elemental shielding. It can spawn with Maliwan or Torgue capacitors, granting resistance or immunity to elemental damage over time, or resistance to explosive damage.

Best used up close for melee-focused play. With Gaige, Sharing is Caring lets Deathtrap copy it: melee hits on him can trigger the fire spikes, and when the shield breaks he sets off the fire nova and gains a large roid melee boost. Also effective on Zer0 and Krieg; Hellborn builds can make good use of the fire effects (avoid Inflammable if you want reliable ignition).

special.description: A hybrid of roid, spike and nova effects, with the highest roid bonus in Borderlands 2.
special.title: His hide turned the mightiest tame...

abilities: When depleted, melee attacks deal bonus Roid Damage.
Releases a Fire Nova blast when depleted.
